evals.prompt: I want to run all the HILDA tests to make sure everything is working correctly. Can you help me execute the test suite?
evals.expected_output: Checks environment setup, validates test data availability, and executes the full HILDA test suite with appropriate pytest commands and error interpretation

assertions.text: Performs environment check for conda, GPU, and test data
assertions.details: Should check conda environment, GPU availability, test data presence before running tests
Should run pytest tests/ -v with proper configuration
Should explain test outcomes and provide guidance for any failures

assertions.text: Maps test categories and expected runtimes
assertions.details: Should describe different test types (unit, integration, model) and their requirements

evals.prompt: Can you run just the fast tests? I don't have GPU available and want to quickly verify the basic functionality works.
evals.expected_output: Selects and runs only fast unit tests that don't require GPU or large models, avoiding integration tests that might be slow

assertions.details: Should select TestListImages and TestMetadataExtraction rather than full pipeline tests
Should avoid HerdNet model tests and other GPU-dependent functionality
Should run specific test classes rather than full test suite
Should indicate fast tests run in under 30 seconds

evals.prompt: The mission import tests are failing with some error about EPSG codes. Can you help me debug this?
evals.expected_output: Provides specific debugging guidance for mission import test failures, focusing on EPSG/coordinate system issues, and suggests targeted test runs

assertions.text: Identifies mission import as specific test category
assertions.details: Should recognize mission import tests in tests/pipeline/mission_import/
Should mention pyproj, GDAL installation, coordinate system validation
Should recommend running specific mission import tests with verbose output
Should describe required drone image data (Mavic 2 Pro, Matrice 4E)
